sourceId.title: Job ID
sourceId.description: The ID of the job ad as encoded on the website.

adUrl.title: Ad URL
adUrl.description: Url for the details page of the ad.

jobTitle.title: Job Title
jobTitle.description: The title name of the job position.

location.title: Location
location.description: The location of the company as extracted from the list page.

salary.title: Salary
salary.description: Salary as advertised on the site.

scrapedAt.title: Scraped At
scrapedAt.description: The date in ISO format when the ad was scraped.

htmlDetailPageKey.title: HTML Key
htmlDetailPageKey.description: Key that identifies the html blob from the details page.
